title: Module 8.1: ANSI Z136 Series Overview
subtitle: Navigate the Foundation of Laser Safety Standards
description: Master the ANSI Z136 series standards structure, understand the relationship between different Z136 documents, and learn to navigate the primary laser safety standard (Z136.1) with interactive tools and progressive disclosure learning.

learning_objectives.objective: Navigate the ANSI Z136 series document structure and identify which standard applies to specific applications
Understand the relationship between ANSI Z136.1 (foundation) and application-specific standards (Z136.3, Z136.10, etc.)
Locate and interpret key sections of ANSI Z136.1 including MPE tables, control measures, and LSO responsibilities
Explain the relationship between ANSI Z136 standards and regulatory requirements (FDA, OSHA)

interactive_components.name: Standards Hierarchy Visualizer
interactive_components.description: Interactive visualization showing relationships between all ANSI Z136 standards

interactive_components.name: Z136.1 Navigator
interactive_components.description: Progressive disclosure exploration of ANSI Z136.1 key sections

interactive_components.name: Standard Selection Challenge
interactive_components.description: Scenario-based selection of appropriate Z136 standard

interactive_components.name: MPE Table Interactive Guide
interactive_components.description: Guided navigation of ANSI Z136.1 Tables 5a/5b

badge.name: ANSI Z136 Navigator
badge.description: Mastered ANSI Z136 series structure and navigation

standards_reference: ANSI Z136.1-2022 Safe Use of Lasers
ANSI Z136.3-2018 Safe Use of Lasers in Health Care
ANSI Z136.10-2022 Safe Use of Lasers in Entertainment
ANSI Z136.8-2022 Safe Use of Lasers in Research
